重大頭條（股市相關） ·

台積電點名AI眼鏡成次世代關鍵載具 宏達電、錼創進行賽道搶位 | 鉅亨網 - 台股新聞TSMC Says AI Glasses Are the Next Frontier; HTC, PlayNitride Vie for Pole Position

https://news.cnyes.com/news/id/6460826

台積電（2330-TW）14日舉辦技術論壇，全球業務資深副總暨副共同營運長張曉強指出，人工智慧正由生成式走向實體與邊緣裝置，其中最具發展潛力的終端應用是智慧眼鏡；此一展望立刻引起市場矚目。宏達電（2498-TW）已推出 AI 眼鏡 VIVE EAGLE，錼創（6854-TW）在 Micro LED 領域居領先地位，可望在接下來的 AI 眼鏡浪潮中扮演關鍵角色。

台積電看好 AI 眼鏡成次世代關鍵載具，宏達電、錼創搶占賽道。（圖：shutterstock）

宏達電先前發表首款支援繁體中文語音的 AI 智慧眼鏡 VIVE Eagle，可連結雲端大模型並提供個人化助理；繼香港、新加坡後，4月22日正式進軍日本，透過官網與當地電信通路 KDDI 全面開賣。

宏達電認為，人工智慧將成下一階段核心動能，並深入營運與研發流程；目前團隊正與日本多家通路商加深合作以擴大亞洲布局，並同步積極投入第二代機種研發。

新型顯示廠錼創（6854-TW）也將受惠這波產業浪潮；錼創在工研院與經濟部產業發展署支持下，與追風科技聯手打造出國內首副彩色高解析 Micro LED 智慧眼鏡。

這款創新裝置將 Micro LED 整合於矽基 CMOS 背板，畫素密度達 4536 PPI，精細度約為現有同類眼鏡的六倍；亮度逾 3000 nits，約為一般 OLED 眼鏡的五到十倍，這項低功耗、高續航技術已在智慧教育場域完成驗證。

業界普遍認為，隨著 Meta 等國際巨頭積極開拓消費需求，智慧眼鏡市場進入高速成長期；在台積電先進製程、高壓顯示平台與射頻技術支撐下，台灣硬體與創新顯示供應鏈將迎來新的轉型契機。

TSMC (2330-TW) held its technology forum on the 14th. Zhang Xiaoqiang, senior vice president of global business and co–chief operating officer, said AI is shifting from generative models to physical and edge devices, with smart glasses as the most promising consumer-facing application—an outlook that immediately drew market attention. HTC (2498-TW) has already launched the AI glasses VIVE EAGLE; PlayNitride (6854-TW) leads in Micro LED and is expected to play a pivotal role in the coming wave of AI glasses.

TSMC sees AI glasses as a next-generation key platform; HTC and PlayNitride race for position. (Photo: shutterstock)

HTC previously unveiled its first AI smart glasses, VIVE Eagle, with Traditional Chinese voice support, able to connect to cloud large models and provide a personalized assistant; after Hong Kong and Singapore, it officially entered Japan on April 22, going on sale widely through its website and local telecom channel KDDI.

HTC believes AI will be the core driver in the next phase and will reach deep into operations and R&D; its team is deepening cooperation with multiple Japanese channel partners to expand its Asia presence while actively investing in development of a second-generation model.

PlayNitride (6854-TW), a next-generation display firm, also stands to benefit from this industry wave; with support from ITRI and the Industrial Development Administration, Ministry of Economic Affairs, it partnered with Chasing Wind Technology to produce the first domestically developed full-color, high-resolution Micro LED smart glasses.

The innovative device integrates Micro LED on a silicon CMOS backplane at 4536 PPI—roughly six times the pixel density of comparable glasses today—with brightness over 3000 nits, about five to ten times that of typical OLED glasses; the low-power, long-endurance technology has been validated in smart-education deployments.

The industry widely believes that as global giants such as Meta aggressively cultivate consumer demand, the smart-glasses market is entering a period of rapid growth; with TSMC’s advanced process technology, high-voltage display platforms, and RF capabilities as a foundation, Taiwan’s hardware and innovative display supply chain faces fresh opportunities to transform.
